questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司創建營運資料並將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。對於公司的年度審計，外部顧問需要存取儲存在 S3 儲存桶中的年度報告。外部顧問需要在 7 天內存取該報告。公司必須實施一個解決方案，以允許外部顧問僅存取報告。哪種解決方案能夠以最高的營運效率滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company creates operations data and stores the data in an Amazon S3 bucket. For the company's annual audit, an external consultant needs to access an annual report that is stored in the S3 bucket. The external consultant needs to access the report for 7 days. The company must implement a solution to allow the external consultant access to only the report. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

A.zh: 建立一個配置為託管公共靜態網站的新 S3 儲存桶。將操作資料遷移到新的 S3 儲存桶。與外部顧問分享 S3 網站 URL。
A.en: Create a new S3 bucket that is configured to host a public static website. Migrate the operations data to the new S3 bucket. Share the S3 website URL with the external consultant.

B.zh: 允許公眾存取 S3 儲存桶 7 天。當外部顧問完成審核後，刪除對 S3 儲存桶的存取權限。
B.en: Enable public access to the S3 bucket for 7 days. Remove access to the S3 bucket when the external consultant completes the audit.

C.zh: 建立一個有權存取 S3 儲存桶中的報告的新 IAM 使用者。向外部顧問提供存取密鑰。 7 天後撤銷存取金鑰。
C.en: Create a new IAM user that has access to the report in the S3 bucket. Provide the access keys to the external consultant. Revoke the access keys after 7 days.

D.zh: 產生一個預簽名 URL，該 URL 具有對 S3 儲存桶上的報告位置所需的存取權限。與外部顧問共用預先簽署的 URL。
D.en: Generate a presigned URL that has the required access to the location of the report on the S3 bucket. Share the presigned URL with the external consultant.

A.zh: 錯誤。建立一個新的 S3 儲存桶並將其配置為公共靜態網站。錯誤：此選項需要額外建立新的 S3 儲存桶並遷移數據，增加了操作複雜性。錯誤：將資料公開為靜態可能會公開資料並違反最小權限原則。
A.en: Incorrect. Create a new S3 bucket and configure it as a public static website. Error: This option requires additional creation of a new S3 bucket and migration of data, increasing operational complexity. Error: Exposing data as static may expose the data and violate the principle of least privilege.

B.zh: 錯誤。允許公眾存取 S3 儲存桶 7 天。錯誤：啟用公共存取會將整個儲存桶的資料暴露給所有人，安全性極低。錯誤：無法限制對特定報告文件的訪問，違反了最小權限原則。
B.en: Incorrect. Enable public access to the S3 bucket for 7 days. Error: Enabling public access will expose the entire bucket's data to everyone, which is extremely low security. Error: Unable to restrict access to specific report files, violating the principle of least privilege.

C.zh: 錯誤。建立新的 IAM 使用者並提供存取金鑰。 Bug：建立新的 IAM 使用者並管理其存取金鑰會增加操作複雜性。錯誤：需手動撤銷存取金鑰，容易出現操作錯誤或延遲。
C.en: Incorrect. Create a new IAM user and provide the access key. Bug: Creating new IAM users and managing their access keys adds operational complexity. Error: The access key needs to be revoked manually, which is prone to operational errors or delays.

D.zh: 正確。產生預簽名 URL 並與外部顧問共用。正確：預先命名的 URL 可以提供對特定檔案的臨時訪問，符合最小權限原則。正確：暱稱URL的有效期限可以設定為7天，以滿足您的需求。正確：操作瘋狂訂單，無需建立額外資源或管理使用者。
D.en: Correct. Generate a pre-signed URL and share it with external advisors. Correct: A prenamed URL can provide temporary access to a specific file, complying with the principle of least privilege. Correct: The validity period of the pre-name URL can be set to 7 days to meet your needs. Correct: To operate a crazy order, there is no need to create additional resources or manage users.

answer_text.zh: D. 產生一個預簽名 URL，該 URL 具有對 S3 儲存桶上的報告位置所需的存取權限。與外部顧問共用預先簽署的 URL。
answer_text.en: D. Generate a presigned URL that has the required access to the location of the report on the S3 bucket. Share the presigned URL with the external consultant.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：產生預簽名 URL 並與外部顧問共用。正確：預先命名的 URL 可以提供對特定檔案的臨時訪問，符合最小權限原則。正確：暱稱URL的有效期限可以設定為7天，以滿足您的需求。正確：操作瘋狂訂單，無需建立額外資源或管理使用者。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Generate a pre-signed URL and share it with external advisors. Correct: A prenamed URL can provide temporary access to a specific file, complying with the principle of least privilege. Correct: The validity period of the pre-name URL can be set to 7 days to meet your needs. Correct: To operate a crazy order, there is no need to create additional resources or manage users.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司計劃在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行高效能運算 (HPC) 工作負載。此工作負載需要低延遲網路效能和高網路吞吐量以及緊密耦合的節點到節點通訊。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company plans to run a high performance computing (HPC) workload on Amazon EC2 Instances. The workload requires low- latency network performance and high network throughput with tightly coupled node-to-node communication. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將 EC2 執行個體配置為叢集放置群組的一部份。
A.en: Configure the EC2 instances to be part of a cluster placement group.

B.zh: 使用專用執行個體租來啟動 EC2 執行個體。
B.en: Launch the EC2 instances with Dedicated Instance tenancy.

C.zh: 將 EC2 執行個體作為 Spot 執行個體啟動。
C.en: Launch the EC2 instances as Spot Instances.

D.zh: 啟動 EC2 執行個體時配置按需容量預留。
D.en: Configure an On-Demand Capacity Reservation when the EC2 instances are launched.

A.zh: 正確。叢集置放群組專為需要低延遲和高吞吐量的工作負載而設計。它允許 EC2 執行個體緊密分佈在實體硬體上，從而優化節點間通訊效能。
A.en: Correct. Cluster Placement Group is specifically designed for workloads that require low latency and high throughput. It allows EC2 instances to be closely distributed across physical hardware, thereby optimizing inter-node communication performance.

B.zh: 錯誤。專用實例租賃主要用於隔離實例以滿足合規性或安全性要求，與網路效能最佳化沒有直接關係。
B.en: Incorrect. Dedicated Instance tenancy is mainly used to isolate instances to meet compliance or security requirements and is not directly related to network performance optimization.

C.zh: 錯誤。Spot 實例是一種成本最佳化選項，與網路效能最佳化沒有直接關係。它不保證低延遲或高吞吐量。
C.en: Incorrect. Spot Instances is a cost optimization option and is not directly related to network performance optimization. It does not guarantee low latency or high throughput.

D.zh: 錯誤。按需容量預留用於確保實例容量可用性，與網路效能最佳化沒有直接關係。
D.en: Incorrect. On-Demand Capacity Reservation is used to ensure instance capacity availability and is not directly related to network performance optimization.

answer_text.zh: A. 將 EC2 執行個體配置為叢集放置群組的一部份。
answer_text.en: A. Configure the EC2 instances to be part of a cluster placement group.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：叢集置放群組專為需要低延遲和高吞吐量的工作負載而設計。它允許 EC2 執行個體緊密分佈在實體硬體上，從而優化節點間通訊效能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Cluster Placement Group is specifically designed for workloads that require low latency and high throughput. It allows EC2 instances to be closely distributed across physical hardware, thereby optimizing inter-node communication performance.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有相距 500 英裡（804.7 公裡）並透過高速光纖電纜互連的主資料中心和輔助資料中心。該公司需要在其資料中心和 AWS 上的 VPC 之間建立高度可用且安全的網路連接，以應對關鍵任務工作負載。解決方案架構師必須選擇提供最大彈性的連接解決方案。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has primary and secondary data centers that are 500 miles (804.7 km) apart and interconnected with high-speed fiber- optic cable. The company needs a highly available and secure network connection between its data centers and a VPC on AWS for a mission-critical workload. A solutions architect must choose a connection solution that provides maximum resiliency. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 兩個來自主資料中心的 AWS Direct Connect 連線終止於兩個不同裝置上的兩個 Direct Connect 位置
A.en: Two AWS Direct Connect connections from the primary data center terminating at two Direct Connect locations on two separate devices

B.zh: 來自每個主資料中心和輔助資料中心的單一 AWS Direct Connect 連接，終止於同一裝置上的一個 Direct Connect 位置
B.en: A single AWS Direct Connect connection from each of the primary and secondary data centers terminating at one Direct Connect location on the same device

C.zh: 兩個來自主資料中心和輔助資料中心的 AWS Direct Connect 連線終止於兩個獨立裝置上的兩個 Direct Connect 位置
C.en: Two AWS Direct Connect connections from each of the primary and secondary data centers terminating at two Direct Connect locations on two separate devices

D.zh: 來自主資料中心和輔助資料中心的單一 AWS Direct Connect 連線終止於兩個獨立裝置上的一個 Direct Connect 位置
D.en: A single AWS Direct Connect connection from each of the primary and secondary data centers terminating at one Direct Connect location on two separate devices

A.zh: 錯誤。兩個 AWS Direct Connect 連接從主資料中心終止到兩個 Direct Connect 位置的兩個獨立設備 由於存在兩個連接和兩個設備，因此提供冗餘。只考慮主資料中心，沒有考慮輔助資料中心的冗餘，無法滿足最大可用性要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Two AWS Direct Connect connections terminated from the main data center to two separate devices at two Direct Connect locations Provides redundancy since there are two connections and two devices. Only the primary data center is considered, and the redundancy of the auxiliary data center is not considered, which cannot meet the maximum availability requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Direct Connect 連線從主資料中心和輔助資料中心終止到同一裝置上的 Direct Connect 位置。提供主資料中心和輔助資料中心之間的連接。兩個連線均終止於同一設備，設備故障會導致連線中斷，無法滿足高可用性要求。
B.en: Incorrect. An AWS Direct Connect connection terminates from the primary data center and the secondary data center to a Direct Connect location on the same device. Provides connections between the primary and secondary data centers. Both connections terminate at the same device, device failure will cause the connection to be interrupted, and high availability requirements cannot be met.

C.zh: 正確。兩個來自主資料中心和輔助資料中心的 AWS Direct Connect 連線在兩個 Direct Connect 位置的兩個獨立裝置上終止。為主資料中心和輔助資料中心提供連接，每個資料中心有兩個連接終止於兩個獨立設備，從而最大限度地提高冗餘和可用性。沒有明顯的缺點。
C.en: Correct. Two AWS Direct Connect connections from the primary and secondary data centers terminating on two independent devices at two Direct Connect locations. Provides connections for the primary and secondary data centers with two connections per data center terminating on two independent devices, maximizing redundancy and availability. No obvious disadvantages.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Direct Connect 連線從主資料中心和輔助資料中心終止到兩個獨立裝置上的 Direct Connect 位置。提供主資料中心和輔助資料中心之間的連接。每個資料中心只有一個連接，無法提供足夠的冗餘，並且連接在同一 Direct Connect 位置終止。定位失敗會導致連線中斷。
D.en: Incorrect. An AWS Direct Connect connection terminates from the primary data center and the secondary data center to a Direct Connect location on two separate devices. Provides connectivity between the primary and secondary data centers. There is only one connection per data center, which does not provide sufficient redundancy, and the connection terminates at the same Direct Connect location. Location failure will cause the connection to be interrupted.

answer_text.zh: C. 兩個來自主資料中心和輔助資料中心的 AWS Direct Connect 連線終止於兩個獨立裝置上的兩個 Direct Connect 位置
answer_text.en: C. Two AWS Direct Connect connections from each of the primary and secondary data centers terminating at two Direct Connect locations on two separate devices

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：兩個來自主資料中心和輔助資料中心的 AWS Direct Connect 連線在兩個 Direct Connect 位置的兩個獨立裝置上終止。為主資料中心和輔助資料中心提供連接，每個資料中心有兩個連接終止於兩個獨立設備，從而最大限度地提高冗餘和可用性。沒有明顯的缺點。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Two AWS Direct Connect connections from the primary and secondary data centers terminating on two independent devices at two Direct Connect locations. Provides connections for the primary and secondary data centers with two connections per data center terminating on two independent devices, maximizing redundancy and availability. No obvious disadvantages.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司執行多個具有高使用率的 Amazon RDS for Oracle 按需資料庫執行個體。 RDS 資料庫執行個體在 AWS Organizations 中組織內的成員帳戶中執行。公司的財務團隊可以存取組織的管理帳戶和成員帳戶。財務團隊希望找到使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 來優化成本的方法。哪一種步驟組合可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company runs several Amazon RDS for Oracle On-Demand DB instances that have high utilization. The RDS DB instances run in member accounts that are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company's finance team has access to the organization's management account and member accounts. The finance team wants to find ways to optimize costs by using AWS Trusted Advisor. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在管理帳戶中使用 Trusted Advisor 建議。
A.en: Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations in the management account.

B.zh: 在執行 RDS 資料庫執行個體的成員帳戶中使用 Trusted Advisor 建議。
B.en: Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations in the member accounts where the RDS DB instances are running.

C.zh: 查看 Trusted Advisor 檢查 Amazon RDS 預留執行個體最佳化。
C.en: Review the Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon RDS Reserved Instance Optimization.

D.zh: 查看 Trusted Advisor 對 Amazon RDS 空閒資料庫執行個體的檢查。
D.en: Review the Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon RDS Idle DB Instances.

E.zh: 查看 Trusted Advisor 檢查以進行計算最佳化。使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 交叉檢查結果。
E.en: Review the Trusted Advisor checks for compute optimization. Crosscheck the results by using AWS Compute Optimizer.

A.zh: 正確。分析：正確。管理帳戶可以查看整個組織內的 Trusted Advisor 建議，適合集中管理和成本優化。
A.en: Correct. Analysis: Correct. Management accounts can view Trusted Advisor recommendations across the entire organization, suitable for centralized management and cost optimization.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：錯誤。雖然會員帳戶可以查看自己的Trusted Advisor建議，但問題需要集中成本優化，而管理帳戶更適合這種場景。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Error. Although member accounts can view their own Trusted Advisor recommendations, the question requires centralized cost optimization, and management accounts are more suitable for this scenario.

C.zh: 正確。分析：正確。預留實例最佳化檢查可以幫助判斷是否可以透過預留實例節省成本，是優化RDS成本的重要方法。
C.en: Correct. Analysis: Correct. The Reserved Instance Optimization check can help identify whether costs can be saved through reserved instances and is an important method for optimizing RDS costs.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：錯誤。空閒資料庫實例檢查適用於未充分利用的資料庫實例，但問題涉及高利用率的實例，因此不適用。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Error. The Idle DB Instances check is applicable to underutilized database instances, but the question refers to highly utilized instances, so it is not applicable.

E.zh: 錯誤。分析：錯誤。計算最佳化主要針對EC2執行個體進行最佳化，與RDS資料庫執行個體無關。
E.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Error. Compute optimization is mainly optimized for EC2 instances and has nothing to do with RDS database instances.

answer_text.zh: A. 在管理帳戶中使用 Trusted Advisor 建議。；C. 查看 Trusted Advisor 檢查 Amazon RDS 預留執行個體最佳化。
answer_text.en: A. Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations in the management account.; C. Review the Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon RDS Reserved Instance Optimization.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AC (78%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：正確。管理帳戶可以查看整個組織內的 Trusted Advisor 建議，適合集中管理和成本優化。；分析：正確。預留實例最佳化檢查可以幫助判斷是否可以透過預留實例節省成本，是優化RDS成本的重要方法。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (78%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Correct. Management accounts can view Trusted Advisor recommendations across the entire organization, suitable for centralized management and cost optimization.; Analysis: Correct. The Reserved Instance Optimization check can help identify whether costs can be saved through reserved instances and is an important method for optimizing RDS costs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師正在建立一個應用程式。該應用程式將在 VPC 中多個可用區的私有子網路中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。 EC2 執行個體將頻繁存取包含機密資訊的大檔案。這些檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中以供處理。解決方案架構師必須優化網路架構，以最大限度地降低資料傳輸成本。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect is creating an application. The application will run on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets across multiple Availability Zones in a VPC. The EC2 instances will frequently access large files that contain confidential information. These files are stored in Amazon S3 buckets for processing. The solutions architect must optimize the network architecture to minimize data transfer costs. What should the solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 VPC 中為 Amazon S3 建立網關終端節點。在私有子網路的路由表中，新增網關端點的條目。
A.en: Create a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPC. In the route tables for the private subnets, add an entry for the gateway endpoint.

B.zh: 在公有子網路中建立單一 NAT 閘道。在私有子網路的路由表中，新增指向 NAT 閘道的預設路由。
B.en: Create a single NAT gateway in a public subnet. In the route tables for the private subnets, add a default route that points to the NAT gateway.

C.zh: 在 VP 中為 Amazon S3 建立 AWS PrivateLink 介面終端節點在私有子網路的路由表中，新增介面終端節點的條目。
C.en: Create an AWS PrivateLink interface endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPIn the route tables for the private subnets, add an entry for the interface endpoint.

D.zh: 為公有子網路中的每個可用區建立一個 NAT 閘道。在私有子網路的每個路由表中，新增指向同一可用區中的 NAT 閘道的預設路由。
D.en: Create one NAT gateway for each Availability Zone in public subnets. In each of the route tables for the private subnets, add a default route that points to the NAT gateway in the same Availability Zone.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon S3 存取節點允許 EC2 執行個體直接存取 S3，而無需建立相互 NAT 存取。這種方式不僅優化了網路架構，而且由於流量互不流入，避免了資料傳輸成本。滿足最佳化結構、最小化資料傳輸成本的要求。
A.en: Correct. Amazon S3 access nodes allow EC2 instances to directly access S3 without establishing a mutual NAT access. This approach not only optimizes the network architecture, but also avoids data transmission costs because the traffic does not flow into each other. Meets the requirements of the optimize the structure and minimize data transmission costs.

B.zh: 錯誤。NAT網關用於允許子網路內的資源互相訪問，但訪問S3時，由於流量需要到達NAT網關，會產生額外的傳輸成本。不滿足問題要求：資料傳輸成本無法最小化。
B.en: Incorrect. NAT gateway is used to allow resources in the subnet to access each other, but additional transmission costs will be incurred when accessing S3 because the traffic needs to reach the NAT gateway. Does not meet the question requirements: Data transmission costs cannot be minimized.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS PrivateLink 介面節點通常用於存取特定服務（例如 API 閘道和自訂服務），但不用於存取 Amazon S3。相較於S3，關閉節點是更合適的選擇。不滿足要求 無法最佳化架構，最小化資料傳輸成本。
C.en: Incorrect. The AWS PrivateLink interface node is often used to access specific services (such as API Gateway and custom services), but is not used to access Amazon S3. Compared to S3, closing nodes is a more appropriate choice. Does not meet the requirements of the Unable to optimize the architecture and minimize data transmission costs.

D.zh: 錯誤。雖然為每個可用區建立 NAT 閘道可以提高可用性，但仍無法避免資料傳輸費用，因為流量需要 NAT 閘道。不滿足問題要求：資料傳輸成本無法最小化。
D.en: Incorrect. Although creating a NAT gateway for each Availability Zone can improve availability, it still does not avoid data transfer charges because the traffic requires a NAT gateway. Does not meet the question requirements: Data transmission costs cannot be minimized.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 VPC 中為 Amazon S3 建立網關終端節點。在私有子網路的路由表中，新增網關端點的條目。
answer_text.en: A. Create a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPC. In the route tables for the private subnets, add an entry for the gateway endpoint.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon S3 存取節點允許 EC2 執行個體直接存取 S3，而無需建立相互 NAT 存取。這種方式不僅優化了網路架構，而且由於流量互不流入，避免了資料傳輸成本。滿足最佳化結構、最小化資料傳輸成本的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon S3 access nodes allow EC2 instances to directly access S3 without establishing a mutual NAT access. This approach not only optimizes the network architecture, but also avoids data transmission costs because the traffic does not flow into each other. Meets the requirements of the optimize the structure and minimize data transmission costs.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望將其本地 MySQL 資料庫遷移到 AWS。該資料庫接受來自面向客戶端的應用程式的定期導入，這會導致大量寫入操作。該公司擔心流量可能會導致應用程式內出現效能問題。解決方案架構師應該如何設計AWS上的架構？
question_text.en: A company wants to relocate its on-premises MySQL database to AWS. The database accepts regular imports from a client-facing application, which causes a high volume of write operations. The company is concerned that the amount of traffic might be causing performance issues within the application. How should a solutions architect design the architecture on AWS?

A.zh: 使用預先設定 IOPS SSD 儲存體預先設定 Amazon RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 監控寫入操作指標。如有必要，調整配置的 IOPS。
A.en: Provision an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance with Provisioned IOPS SSD storage. Monitor write operation metrics by using Amazon CloudWatch. Adjust the provisioned IOPS if necessary.

B.zh: 使用通用 SSD 儲存配置 Amazon RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體。將 Amazon ElastiCache 叢集放置在資料庫執行個體前面。配置應用程式以查詢 ElastiCache。
B.en: Provision an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance with General Purpose SSD storage. Place an Amazon ElastiCache cluster in front of the DB instance. Configure the application to query ElastiCache instead.

C.zh: 使用記憶體最佳化執行個體類型預設 Amazon DocumentDB（與 MongoDB 相容）執行個體。監控 Amazon CloudWatch 是否有與效能相關的問題。如有必要，請變更實例類別。
C.en: Provision an Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) instance with a memory optimized instance type. Monitor Amazon CloudWatch for performance-related issues. Change the instance class if necessary.

D.zh: 在通用效能模式下預設 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。監控 Amazon CloudWatch 的 IOPS 瓶頸。如有必要，請變更為預先配置吞吐量效能模式。
D.en: Provision an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system in General Purpose performance mode. Monitor Amazon CloudWatch for IOPS bottlenecks. Change to Provisioned Throughput performance mode if necessary.

A.zh: 正確。Provisioning IOPS SSD儲存專為高效能、高寫入量場景而設計，可提供穩定的IOPS效能。正確：使用 Amazon CloudWatch 監控寫入操作指標是一種標準的效能監控方法，可協助識別瓶頸並調整 IOPS 配置。此選項完全滿足問題的要求，解決了高寫入量可能帶來的效能問題。
A.en: Correct. Provisioned IOPS SSD storage is specially designed for high-performance, high-write-volume scenarios and can provide stable IOPS performance. Correct: Using Amazon CloudWatch to monitor write operation metrics is a standard performance monitoring method and can help identify bottlenecks and adjust IOPS configurations. This option fully meets the requirements of the question and solves the performance problems that may be caused by high write volume.

B.zh: 錯誤。通用SSD儲存不適合高寫入量場景，效能可能無法達到要求。錯誤：ElastiCache主要用於快取讀取操作，問題重點在於寫入操作效能問題。 ElastiCache無法解決寫入瓶頸。
B.en: Incorrect. General Purpose SSD storage is not suitable for high write volume scenarios, and the performance may not meet the requirements. Error: ElastiCache is mainly used to cache read operations, and the question focuses on write operation performance issues. ElastiCache cannot solve the write bottleneck.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon DocumentDB是為文件資料庫設計的，與MySQL不相容，無法滿足問題要求。錯誤：問題明確提到了 MySQL 資料庫，而不是 DocumentDB。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon DocumentDB is designed for document databases and is incompatible with MySQL and cannot meet the question requirements. Error: The question clearly mentions the MySQL database, not DocumentDB.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EFS 是一種檔案儲存服務，不符合關聯式資料庫（例如 MySQL）的需求。錯誤：問題的重點是資料庫效能最佳化，而不是檔案儲存效能。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon EFS is a file storage service that does not match the needs of relational databases (such as MySQL). Error: The question focuses on database performance optimization, not file storage performance.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用預先設定 IOPS SSD 儲存體預先設定 Amazon RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 監控寫入操作指標。如有必要，調整配置的 IOPS。
answer_text.en: A. Provision an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance with Provisioned IOPS SSD storage. Monitor write operation metrics by using Amazon CloudWatch. Adjust the provisioned IOPS if necessary.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (81%)； B (19%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Provisioning IOPS SSD儲存專為高效能、高寫入量場景而設計，可提供穩定的IOPS效能。正確：使用 Amazon CloudWatch 監控寫入操作指標是一種標準的效能監控方法，可協助識別瓶頸並調整 IOPS 配置。此選項完全滿足問題的要求，解決了高寫入量可能帶來的效能問題。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (81%); B (19%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Provisioned IOPS SSD storage is specially designed for high-performance, high-write-volume scenarios and can provide stable IOPS performance. Correct: Using Amazon CloudWatch to monitor write operation metrics is a standard performance monitoring method and can help identify bottlenecks and adjust IOPS configurations. This option fully meets the requirements of the question and solves the performance problems that may be caused by high write volume.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 雲端中運行一個應用程序，該應用程式會產生敏感的存檔資料檔案。該公司希望重新建構應用程式的資料儲存。該公司希望對資料檔案進行加密，並確保在資料加密並傳送到 AWS 之前第三方無法存取資料。該公司已經創建了一個 Amazon S3 儲存桶。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an application in the AWS Cloud that generates sensitive archival data files. The company wants to rearchitect the application's data storage. The company wants to encrypt the data files and to ensure that third parties do not have access to the data before the data is encrypted and sent to AWS. The company has already created an Amazon S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將 S3 儲存桶配置為使用具有 Amazon S3 託管加密金鑰的用戶端加密。配置應用程式以使用 S3 儲存桶來儲存存檔檔案。
A.en: Configure the S3 bucket to use client-side encryption with an Amazon S3 managed encryption key. Configure the application to use the S3 bucket to store the archival files.

B.zh: 將 S3 儲存桶配置為透過 AWS KMS 金鑰 (SSE-KMS) 使用伺服器端加密。配置應用程式以使用 S3 儲存桶來儲存存檔檔案。
B.en: Configure the S3 bucket to use server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS). Configure the application to use the S3 bucket to store the archival files.

C.zh: 將 S3 儲存桶配置為使用具有 AWS KMS 金鑰的雙層伺服器端加密 (SSE-KMS)。配置應用程式以使用 S3 儲存桶來儲存存檔檔案。
C.en: Configure the S3 bucket to use dual-layer server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS). Configure the application to use the S3 bucket to store the archival files.

D.zh: 將應用程式設定為使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 中儲存的金鑰進行用戶端加密。設定應用程式以將存檔檔案儲存在 S3 儲存桶中。
D.en: Configure the application to use client-side encryption with a key stored in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). Configure the application to store the archival files in the S3 bucket.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon S3 託管加密金鑰配置 S3 儲存桶以進行用戶端加密。錯誤：Amazon S3 託管加密是伺服器加密的一部分，而不是客戶端加密的一部分。客戶加密要求資料在發送到AWS之前進行加密，因此該選項沒有提及如何在客戶端加密資料。
A.en: Incorrect. Configure the S3 bucket for client-side encryption using Amazon S3 managed encryption keys. Error: Amazon S3 hosted encryption is part of the server's encryption, not part of the client's encryption. Customer encryption requires that the data is encrypted before being sent to AWS, so this option does not mention how to encrypt data on the customer side.

B.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS KMS 密鑰 (SSE-KMS) 配置 S3 存儲桶以進行伺服器端加密。錯誤：伺服器加密 (SSE-KMS) 在將資料傳送到 AWS 後對資料進行加密，但問題要求在將資料傳送到 AWS 之前進行加密。此選項不滿足確保第三方在加密之前無法訪問數據的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Configure the S3 bucket for server-side encryption using AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS). Error: Server encryption (SSE-KMS) encrypts the data after it is sent to AWS, but the question requires encryption before the data is sent to AWS. This option does not meet the requirement to ensure that third parties cannot access the data before it is encrypted.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS KMS 密鑰 (SSE-KMS) 配置 S3 存儲桶以進行兩層伺服器端加密。錯誤：雙層伺服器加密在數據發送到AWS後仍然對數據進行加密，不符合問題所要求的客戶加密要求。此選項並沒有解決資料在傳輸過程中可能被第三方存取的問題。
C.en: Incorrect. Configure the S3 bucket for two-layer server-side encryption using AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS). Error: The double-layer server encryption still encrypts the data after it is sent to AWS, which does not meet the customer encryption requirements required by the question. This option does not solve the problem that data may be accessed by third parties during transmission.

D.zh: 正確。將應用程式配置為使用 AWS KMS 中存儲的密鑰進行客戶端加密。正確：客戶加密可確保資料在傳送到 AWS 之前進行加密，從而滿足問題要求。使用 AWS KMS 存儲密鑰是一種安全最佳實踐，可以與客戶一起加密。
D.en: Correct. Configure the application to use keys stored in AWS KMS for client-side encryption. Correct: Customer encryption ensures that the data is encrypted before being sent to AWS, thus meeting the question requirements. Using AWS KMS storage keys is a security best practice and can be encrypted with customers.

answer_text.zh: D. 將應用程式設定為使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 中儲存的金鑰進行用戶端加密。設定應用程式以將存檔檔案儲存在 S3 儲存桶中。
answer_text.en: D. Configure the application to use client-side encryption with a key stored in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). Configure the application to store the archival files in the S3 bucket.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：將應用程式配置為使用 AWS KMS 中存儲的密鑰進行客戶端加密。正確：客戶加密可確保資料在傳送到 AWS 之前進行加密，從而滿足問題要求。使用 AWS KMS 存儲密鑰是一種安全最佳實踐，可以與客戶一起加密。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Configure the application to use keys stored in AWS KMS for client-side encryption. Correct: Customer encryption ensures that the data is encrypted before being sent to AWS, thus meeting the question requirements. Using AWS KMS storage keys is a security best practice and can be encrypted with customers.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon RDS 及其資料庫層的預設備份設定。該公司需要每天對資料庫進行備份以滿足監管要求。公司必須將備份保留 30 天。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company uses Amazon RDS with default backup settings for its database tier. The company needs to make a daily backup of the database to meet regulatory requirements. The company must retain the backups for 30 days. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 寫一個 AWS Lambda 函數來每天建立一個 RDS 快照。
A.en: Write an AWS Lambda function to create an RDS snapshot every day.

B.zh: 修改 RDS 資料庫，將自動備份的保留期設定為 30 天。
B.en: Modify the RDS database to have a retention period of 30 days for automated backups.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 維護時段修改 RDS 備份保留期。
C.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Maintenance Windows to modify the RDS backup retention period.

D.zh: 使用 AWS CLI 每天建立手動快照。修改RDS備份保留期限。
D.en: Create a manual snapshot every day by using the AWS CLI. Modify the RDS backup retention period.

A.zh: 錯誤。透過Lambda函數可以實現每天建立快照，但需要額外的程式碼和Lambda函數的維護。營運開銷：較高，因為需要開發、部署和維護 Lambda 函數。不符合「最低營運開銷」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Creating snapshots every day can be achieved through Lambda functions, but additional code and maintenance of Lambda functions are required. Operational overhead: higher because of the need to develop, deploy, and maintain Lambda functions. The requirement of "minimum operational overhead" is not met.

B.zh: 正確。RDS支援自動備份，並允許設定備份保留期限，最長可設定35天。運營開銷：最小，因為只需要修改一項配置，不需要額外的開發或維護。它滿足「最小運營開銷」的要求，是正確答案。
B.en: Correct. RDS supports automatic backup and allows setting the backup retention period, which can be set up to 35 days. Operational Overhead: Minimal since only one configuration needs to be modified, no additional development or maintenance is required. It meets the requirement of "minimum operating overhead" and is the correct answer.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Systems Manager 維護時段主要用於規劃維護任務，不直接用於修改 RDS 備份保留期。營運開銷：較高，因為需要配置維護時段並關聯任務。不符合題目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS Systems Manager Maintenance Windows is mainly used for scheduled maintenance tasks and is not directly used to modify the RDS backup retention period. Operational overhead: higher because maintenance windows need to be configured and tasks associated. Does not meet the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。手動快照可以滿足備份需求，但需要每天執行CLI指令，且手動快照和自動備份是獨立的機制。營運開銷：較高，因為每天都需要手動操作或腳本自動化。不符合「最低營運開銷」的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Manual snapshots can meet backup requirements, but CLI commands need to be executed every day, and manual snapshots and automatic backups are independent mechanisms. Operational overhead: higher because manual operations or scripting automation are required on a daily basis. The requirement of "minimum operational overhead" is not met.

answer_text.zh: B. 修改 RDS 資料庫，將自動備份的保留期設定為 30 天。
answer_text.en: B. Modify the RDS database to have a retention period of 30 days for automated backups.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：RDS支援自動備份，並允許設定備份保留期限，最長可設定35天。運營開銷：最小，因為只需要修改一項配置，不需要額外的開發或維護。它滿足「最小運營開銷」的要求，是正確答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: RDS supports automatic backup and allows setting the backup retention period, which can be set up to 35 days. Operational Overhead: Minimal since only one configuration needs to be modified, no additional development or maintenance is required. It meets the requirement of "minimum operating overhead" and is the correct answer.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家在 AWS 上運行其應用程式的公司使用 Amazon Aurora 資料庫叢集作為其資料庫。在多個使用者存取和讀取資料的高峰使用時段，監控系統顯示寫入查詢的資料庫效能下降。該公司希望提高應用程式的可擴展性，以滿足高峰使用需求。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company that runs its application on AWS uses an Amazon Aurora DB cluster as its database. During peak usage hours when multiple users access and read the data, the monitoring system shows degradation of database performance for the write queries. The company wants to increase the scalability of the application to meet peak usage demands. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 建立第二個 Aurora 資料庫叢集。配置複製作業以將使用者資料複製到新資料庫。更新應用程式以使用第二個資料庫讀取資料。
A.en: Create a second Aurora DB cluster. Configure a copy job to replicate the users’ data to the new database. Update the application to use the second database to read the data.

B.zh: 在現有 Aurora 資料庫叢集前面建立一個 Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 叢集。更新應用程式以使用 DAX 叢集進行唯讀查詢。將資料直接寫入 Aurora 資料庫叢集。
B.en: Create an Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) cluster in front of the existing Aurora DB cluster. Update the application to use the DAX cluster for read-only queries. Write data directly to the Aurora DB cluster.

C.zh: 在現有 Aurora 資料庫叢集中建立 Aurora 唯讀副本。更新應用程式以使用副本端點進行唯讀查詢，並使用叢集端點進行寫入查詢。
C.en: Create an Aurora read replica in the existing Aurora DB cluster. Update the application to use the replica endpoint for read- only queries and to use the cluster endpoint for write queries.

D.zh: 建立 Amazon Redshift 叢集。將使用者資料複製到 Redshift 叢集。更新應用程式以連接到 Redshift 叢集並在 Redshift 叢集上執行唯讀查詢。
D.en: Create an Amazon Redshift cluster. Copy the users' data to the Redshift cluster. Update the application to connect to the Redshift cluster and to perform read-only queries on the Redshift cluster.

A.zh: 錯誤。建立第二個 Aurora 資料庫叢集。錯誤：建立兩個 Aurora 資料庫叢集會增加成本，因為維護這兩個叢集需要額外的資源。錯誤：配置複製作業和更新應用程式序列非常複雜，並不是最佳解決方案。
A.en: Incorrect. Create a second Aurora DB cluster. Error: Creating two Aurora DB clusters increases costs because additional resources are required to maintain both clusters. Error: Configuring the replication job and updating the application sequence is highly complex and is not an optimal solution.

B.zh: 錯誤。建立 Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 叢集。錯誤：DAX 是專為 Amazon DynamoDB 設計的儲存解決方案，而不是 Aurora 的本機解決方案。錯誤：Aurora 未直接與 DAX 集成，因此此選項不適用。
B.en: Incorrect. Create an Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) cluster. Error: DAX is a storage solution designed for Amazon DynamoDB and is not a native solution for Aurora. Error: Aurora is not directly integrated with DAX, so this option is not applicable.

C.zh: 正確。建立 Aurora 唯讀副本。正確：Aurora 支援建立唯讀副本，可以分擔讀取操作的負載，從而提高寫入操作的效能。正確：唯讀副本成本低廉，並且與現有 Aurora 叢集無縫集成，使其成為最佳解決方案。
C.en: Correct. Create an Aurora read replica. Correct: Aurora supports the creation of read-only replicas, which can share the load of read operations and thus improve the performance of write operations. Correct: Read replicas are low-cost and seamlessly integrated with existing Aurora clusters, making them the optimal solution.

D.zh: 錯誤。建立 Amazon Redshift 叢集。錯誤：Redshift是專門為資料倉儲設計的服務，不適合處理事務型資料庫的即時讀寫作業。錯誤：將資料複製到Redshift會增加複雜性和成本，不符合問題的「成本效益」要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Create an Amazon Redshift cluster. Error: Redshift is a service designed specifically for data warehouses and is not suitable for processing real-time read and write operations of transactional databases. Error: Copying data to Redshift will increase complexity and cost, and does not meet the "cost-effectiveness" requirement of the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 在現有 Aurora 資料庫叢集中建立 Aurora 唯讀副本。更新應用程式以使用副本端點進行唯讀查詢，並使用叢集端點進行寫入查詢。
answer_text.en: C. Create an Aurora read replica in the existing Aurora DB cluster. Update the application to use the replica endpoint for read- only queries and to use the cluster endpoint for write queries.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (86%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：建立 Aurora 唯讀副本。正確：Aurora 支援建立唯讀副本，可以分擔讀取操作的負載，從而提高寫入操作的效能。正確：唯讀副本成本低廉，並且與現有 Aurora 叢集無縫集成，使其成為最佳解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (86%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Create an Aurora read replica. Correct: Aurora supports the creation of read-only replicas, which can share the load of read operations and thus improve the performance of write operations. Correct: Read replicas are low-cost and seamlessly integrated with existing Aurora clusters, making them the optimal solution.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司的近實時流應用程式正在 AWS 上運行。提取資料時，作業將在資料上運行，需要 30 分鐘才能完成。由於大量傳入數據，工作負載經常遇到高延遲。解決方案架構師需要設計可擴展的無伺服器解決方案以提高效能。解決方案架構師應該採取哪一種步驟組合？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company's near-real-time streaming application is running on AWS. As the data is ingested, a job runs on the data and takes 30 minutes to complete. The workload frequently experiences high latency due to large amounts of incoming data. A solutions architect needs to design a scalable and serverless solution to enhance performance. Which combination of steps should the solutions architect take? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 擷取資料。
A.en: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to ingest the data.

B.zh: 將 AWS Lambda 與 AWS Step Functions 結合使用來處理資料。
B.en: Use AWS Lambda with AWS Step Functions to process the data.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 擷取資料。
C.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to ingest the data.

D.zh: 使用 Auto Scaling 群組中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體來處理資料。
D.en: Use Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group to process the data.

E.zh: 將 AWS Fargate 與 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 結合使用來處理資料。
E.en: Use AWS Fargate with Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) to process the data.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 是一項完全託管的服務，專為串流資料的擷取和傳輸而設計。它支援高吞吐量，並且可以無縫匯出到其他AWS服務，非常適合近實時串流資料處理場景。
A.en: Correct. Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose is a fully managed service designed for the ingestion and delivery of streaming data. It supports high throughput and can be seamlessly exported to other AWS services, making it ideal for near-real-time streaming data processing scenarios.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然AWS Lambda和Step Functions可以用於無伺服器運算，但Lambda的執行時間限制為15分鐘，且問題中提到處理任務需要30分鐘，因此Lambda不適合這種場景。
B.en: Incorrect. Although AWS Lambda and Step Functions can be used for serverless computing, Lambda's execution time is limited to 15 minutes, and the question mentions that it takes 30 minutes to process the task, so Lambda is not suitable for this scenario.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS DMS 主要用於資料庫遷移，而不是流數據攝取。不適合處理近即時的串流資料場景。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS DMS is primarily used for database migration, not streaming data ingestion. It is not suitable for processing near real-time streaming data scenarios.

D.zh: 錯誤。雖然 EC2 實例可以通過 Auto Scaling 實現可擴展性，但它們不是無伺服器解決方案，需要額外的管理工作。題目要求設計無伺服器解決方案，所以不符合要求。
D.en: Incorrect. While EC2 instances can achieve scalability with Auto Scaling, they are not a serverless solution and require additional management efforts. The question requires the design of a serverless solution, so it does not meet the requirements.

E.zh: 正確。AWS Fargate 是一種無伺服器計算引擎，可與 Amazon ECS 交互以運行容器化應用程式。它支持長時間運行（超出 Lambda 時間限制）的任務，並且不需要管理底層基礎設施，非常適合處理短至 30 分鐘的任務。
E.en: Correct. AWS Fargate is a serverless computing engine that interfaces with Amazon ECS for running containerized applications. It supports tasks that run for a long time (beyond Lambda's time limit), and does not require management of the underlying infrastructure, making it ideal for processing tasks as short as 30 minutes.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 擷取資料。；E. 將 AWS Fargate 與 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 結合使用來處理資料。
answer_text.en: A. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to ingest the data.; E. Use AWS Fargate with Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) to process the data.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AE (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 是一項完全託管的服務，專為串流資料的擷取和傳輸而設計。它支援高吞吐量，並且可以無縫匯出到其他AWS服務，非常適合近實時串流資料處理場景。；AWS Fargate 是一種無伺服器計算引擎，可與 Amazon ECS 交互以運行容器化應用程式。它支持長時間運行（超出 Lambda 時間限制）的任務，並且不需要管理底層基礎設施，非常適合處理短至 30 分鐘的任務。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose is a fully managed service designed for the ingestion and delivery of streaming data. It supports high throughput and can be seamlessly exported to other AWS services, making it ideal for near-real-time streaming data processing scenarios.; AWS Fargate is a serverless computing engine that interfaces with Amazon ECS for running containerized applications. It supports tasks that run for a long time (beyond Lambda's time limit), and does not require management of the underlying infrastructure, making it ideal for processing tasks as short as 30 minutes.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 VPC 中的多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行 Web 應用程式。應用程式需要將敏感資料寫入 Amazon S3 儲存桶。資料無法透過公共網際網路發送。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a web application on multiple Amazon EC2 instances in a VPC. The application needs to write sensitive data to an Amazon S3 bucket. The data cannot be sent over the public internet. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 為 Amazon S3 建立閘道 VPC 終端節點。在 VPC 路由表中建立到終端節點的路由。
A.en: Create a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3. Create a route in the VPC route table to the endpoint.

B.zh: 建立一個以 S3 儲存桶作為目標的內部網路負載平衡器。
B.en: Create an internal Network Load Balancer that has the S3 bucket as the target.

C.zh: 在 VP 內部署 S3 儲存桶在 VPC 路由表中建立一條到該儲存桶的路由。
C.en: Deploy the S3 bucket inside the VPCreate a route in the VPC route table to the bucket.

D.zh: 在 VPC 和 S3 區域終端節點之間建立 AWS Direct Connect 連線。
D.en: Create an AWS Direct Connect connection between the VPC and an S3 regional endpoint.

A.zh: 正確。。網關 VPC 終端節點允許從 VPC 安全訪問 Amazon S3，而無需訪問公共網際網路。在VPC路由表中添加路由，以確保流量私密地到達S3。
A.en: Correct. . Gateway VPC Endpoint allows secure access to Amazon S3 from a VPC without access to the public internet. adds routes in the VPC routing table to ensure that traffic reaches S3 privately.

B.zh: 錯誤。。網絡負載均衡器無法直接定位 Amazon S3。 S3 是託管服務，不能用作負載均衡器的後端目標。
B.en: Incorrect. . Network Load Balancer cannot target Amazon S3 directly. S3 is a hosted service and cannot be used as a backend target for a load balancer.

C.zh: 錯誤。。 Amazon S3 是區域服務，無法直接部署在 VPC 內。存取S3需要VPC端點或其他方法。
C.en: Incorrect. . Amazon S3 is a regional service and cannot be deployed directly inside a VPC. Access to S3 requires a VPC Endpoint or other methods.

D.zh: 錯誤。。雖然AWS Direct Connect可以提供專線連接，但它通常用於跨數據中心或企業網絡連接AWS服務，而不是解決VPC內對S3的訪問問題。專線成本較高，不適合該場景。
D.en: Incorrect. . Although AWS Direct Connect can provide dedicated line connection, it is often used to connect to AWS services across data centers or enterprise networks, rather than solving the access problem to S3 within a VPC. Direct Connect is relatively expensive and is not suitable for this scenario.

answer_text.zh: A. 為 Amazon S3 建立閘道 VPC 終端節點。在 VPC 路由表中建立到終端節點的路由。
answer_text.en: A. Create a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3. Create a route in the VPC route table to the endpoint.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：。網關 VPC 終端節點允許從 VPC 安全訪問 Amazon S3，而無需訪問公共網際網路。在VPC路由表中添加路由，以確保流量私密地到達S3。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: . Gateway VPC Endpoint allows secure access to Amazon S3 from a VPC without access to the public internet. adds routes in the VPC routing table to ensure that traffic reaches S3 privately.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在具有 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 磁碟區的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行其生產工作負載。解決方案架構師需要分析目前的 EBS 容量成本並提出最佳化建議。這些建議需要包括估計的每月節省機會。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs its production workload on Amazon EC2 instances with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes. A solutions architect needs to analyze the current EBS volume cost and to recommend optimizations. The recommendations need to include estimated monthly saving opportunities. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon Inspector 報告產生 EBS 磁碟區建議以進行最佳化。
A.en: Use Amazon Inspector reporting to generate EBS volume recommendations for optimization.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 報表來確定 EBS 磁碟區最佳化建議。
B.en: Use AWS Systems Manager reporting to determine EBS volume recommendations for optimization.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch 指標報告來確定 EBS 磁碟區最佳化建議。
C.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch metrics reporting to determine EBS volume recommendations for optimization.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 產生 EBS 磁碟區建議以進行最佳化。
D.en: Use AWS Compute Optimizer to generate EBS volume recommendations for optimization.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Inspector 主要用於安全評估和漏洞掃描，而不是成本優化。此選項與 EBS 卷的成本優化無關，因此也是如此。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon Inspector is mainly used for security assessment and vulnerability scanning, not cost optimization. This option has nothing to do with cost optimization of EBS volumes and is therefore.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Systems Manager 主要用於管理和自動化操作任務，例如補丁管理和配置管理。雖然它可以提供一些資源信息，但它並不是專門用於EBS卷的成本最佳化。該選項不符合題目要求，因此是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS Systems Manager is primarily used to manage and automate operational tasks such as patch management and configuration management. Although it can provide some resource information, it is not specifically used for cost optimization of EBS volumes. This option does not meet the question requirements and is therefore incorrect.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon CloudWatch 主要用於控制和收集指標數據，例如效能和使用情況。雖然它可以提供 EBS 磁碟區的使用數據，但它不直接提供成本優化建議。此選項不完全符合題目要求，因此是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon CloudWatch is primarily used to control and collect metric data, such as performance and usage. While it can provide usage data for EBS volumes, it does not directly provide cost optimization recommendations. This option does not fully meet the question requirements and is therefore incorrect.

D.zh: 正確。AWS Compute Optimizer 旨在分析資源使用情況並提供最佳化建議，包括 EBS 磁碟區的成本最佳化。它可以產生最佳化建議並提供潛在的節省機會，完全滿足問題的要求。這個選項是正確的。
D.en: Correct. AWS Compute Optimizer is designed to analyze resource usage and provide optimization recommendations, including cost optimization of EBS volumes. It can generate optimization suggestions and provide potential savings opportunities, fully meeting the requirements of the question. This option is correct.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 產生 EBS 磁碟區建議以進行最佳化。
answer_text.en: D. Use AWS Compute Optimizer to generate EBS volume recommendations for optimization.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Compute Optimizer 旨在分析資源使用情況並提供最佳化建議，包括 EBS 磁碟區的成本最佳化。它可以產生最佳化建議並提供潛在的節省機會，完全滿足問題的要求。這個選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Compute Optimizer is designed to analyze resource usage and provide optimization recommendations, including cost optimization of EBS volumes. It can generate optimization suggestions and provide potential savings opportunities, fully meeting the requirements of the question. This option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家跨國公司在 AWS 上運行其工作負載。該公司的應用程式使用跨 AWS 區域的 Amazon S3 儲存桶來儲存和分析敏感資料。該公司每天在多個 S3 儲存桶中儲存數百萬個物件。該公司希望識別所有未啟用版本控制的 S3 儲存桶。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A global company runs its workloads on AWS. The company's application uses Amazon S3 buckets across AWS Regions for sensitive data storage and analysis. The company stores millions of objects in multiple S3 buckets daily. The company wants to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 設定一個 AWS CloudTrail 事件，該事件具有用於識別未跨區域啟用版本控制的所有 S3 儲存桶的規則。
A.en: Set up an AWS CloudTrail event that has a rule to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 Storage Lens 識別未跨區域啟用版本控制的所有 S3 儲存桶。
B.en: Use Amazon S3 Storage Lens to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

C.zh: 啟用 S3 的 IAM 存取分析器以識別未跨區域啟用版本控制的所有 S3 儲存桶。
C.en: Enable IAM Access Analyzer for S3 to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

D.zh: 建立 S3 多區域存取點以識別未跨區域啟用版本控制的所有 S3 儲存桶。
D.en: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

A.zh: 錯誤。。 AWS CloudTrail 記錄 API 活動，但不會聚合所有區域的 S3 儲存桶的版本控製配置； S3 儲存鏡頭提供了所需的指標。
A.en: Incorrect. . AWS CloudTrail logs API activity but does not aggregate the versioning configuration of S3 buckets across all regions; S3 Storage Lens provides the required metrics.

B.zh: 正確。。 Amazon S3 Storage Lens 是一種儲存分析工具，可提供跨帳戶和跨區域的儲存使用情況和活動指標。它支援識別未啟用版本控制的S3儲存桶，因此滿足問題要求。
B.en: Correct. . Amazon S3 Storage Lens is a storage analytics tool that provides cross-account and cross-region storage usage and activity metrics. It supports identifying S3 buckets that do not have version control enabled, so it meets the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。。 IAM存取分析器主要用於分析資源存取權限，而不是檢查S3儲存桶的版本控制狀態。因此不適合解決這個問題。
C.en: Incorrect. . IAM Access Analyzer is mainly used to analyze resource access permissions, rather than checking the version control status of S3 buckets. Therefore it is not suitable to solve this problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。。 S3多區域接入點用於跨區域存取S3儲存桶，但不提供分析功能，無法辨識未啟用版本控制的儲存桶。
D.en: Incorrect. . S3 Multi-Region Access Point is used to access S3 buckets across regions, but it does not provide analysis functions and cannot identify buckets that do not have version control enabled.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Amazon S3 Storage Lens 識別未跨區域啟用版本控制的所有 S3 儲存桶。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon S3 Storage Lens to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：。 Amazon S3 Storage Lens 是一種儲存分析工具，可提供跨帳戶和跨區域的儲存使用情況和活動指標。它支援識別未啟用版本控制的S3儲存桶，因此滿足問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: . Amazon S3 Storage Lens is a storage analytics tool that provides cross-account and cross-region storage usage and activity metrics. It supports identifying S3 buckets that do not have version control enabled, so it meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望增強其部署在 AWS 上的電子商務訂單處理應用程式。應用程式必須準確地處理每個訂單一次，並且在不可預測的流量激增期間不會影響客戶體驗。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to enhance its ecommerce order-processing application that is deployed on AWS. The application must process each order exactly once without affecting the customer experience during unpredictable traffic surges. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 建立 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 佇列。將所有訂單放入SQS隊列中。將 AWS Lambda 函數配置為處理訂單的目標。
A.en: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Put all the orders in the SQS queue. Configure an AWS Lambda function as the target to process the orders.

B.zh: 建立 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 標準主題。將所有訂單發佈到SNS標準主題。將應用程式配置為通知目標。
B.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) standard topic. Publish all the orders to the SNS standard topic. Configure the application as a notification target.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon AppFlow 建立流。將訂單發送到流程。將 AWS Lambda 函數配置為處理訂單的目標。
C.en: Create a flow by using Amazon AppFlow. Send the orders to the flow. Configure an AWS Lambda function as the target to process the orders.

D.zh: 在應用程式中設定 AWS X-Ray 以追蹤訂單請求。配置應用程式以透過從 Amazon CloudWatch 提取訂單來處理訂單。
D.en: Configure AWS X-Ray in the application to track the order requests. Configure the application to process the orders by pulling the orders from Amazon CloudWatch.

A.zh: 正確。分析：Amazon SQS FIFO列可以保證訂單以相同的方式處理，並且只處理一個文件，滿足「每個訂單都在一個文件中處理」的問題。使用AWS Lambda函數作為目標可以實現自動化處理，並且Lambda可以根據流量動態伸縮，適應流量的增加。這個選項對於這個問題來說完全足夠了。
A.en: Correct. Analysis: Amazon SQS FIFO column can ensure that the order is processed in the same way and only one file is processed, which meets the question of "each order is processed in one file". Using an AWS Lambda function as a target can implement automated processing, and Lambda can dynamically scale according to the traffic volume, adapting to the increase in traffic. this option are completely sufficient for the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：Amazon SNS 是一種發送/排序服務，適合廣播，但不能保證該服務「只處理一個檔案」。此選項不符合問題的要求，因為沒有任何欄位來確保訂單被唯一地處理。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Amazon SNS is a sending/ordering service, suitable for broadcasting, but there is no guarantee that the service "only processes one file". this option does not meet the requirements of the question because there is no bar to ensure that the order is processed uniquely.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：Amazon AppFlow主要用於資料輸入和傳輸，不適合即時訂單處理場景。此選項不符合問題的要求，因為 AppFlow 已暢通無阻並確保僅進行唯一處理。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Amazon AppFlow is mainly used for data input and transmission, and is not suitable for real-time order processing scenarios. The option does not meet the requirements of the question because AppFlow is unblocked and ensures only unique processing.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：AWS X-Ray 用於交付追蹤和調試，不適合處理訂單清單。從 Amazon CloudWatch 中提取訂單並進行處理並不是標準的訂單處理解決方案，並且無法確保唯一正確的處理方式。該選項不符合問題要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: AWS X-Ray is used for delivery tracking and debugging, and is not suitable for processing order lists. Pulling orders from Amazon CloudWatch and processing them is not a standard order processing solution, and there is no way to ensure the only correct way to process it. this option does not meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: A. 建立 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 佇列。將所有訂單放入SQS隊列中。將 AWS Lambda 函數配置為處理訂單的目標。
answer_text.en: A. Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Put all the orders in the SQS queue. Configure an AWS Lambda function as the target to process the orders.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：Amazon SQS FIFO列可以保證訂單以相同的方式處理，並且只處理一個文件，滿足「每個訂單都在一個文件中處理」的問題。使用AWS Lambda函數作為目標可以實現自動化處理，並且Lambda可以根據流量動態伸縮，適應流量的增加。這個選項對於這個問題來說完全足夠了。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Amazon SQS FIFO column can ensure that the order is processed in the same way and only one file is processed, which meets the question of "each order is processed in one file". Using an AWS Lambda function as a target can implement automated processing, and Lambda can dynamically scale according to the traffic volume, adapting to the increase in traffic. this option are completely sufficient for the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有兩個 AWS 帳戶：生產帳戶和開發帳戶。公司需要將開發帳戶中的程式碼變更推送到生產帳戶。在 alpha 階段，開發團隊中只有兩名資深開發人員需要存取生產帳戶。在測試階段，更多的開發人員將需要存取權限來執行測試。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has two AWS accounts: Production and Development. The company needs to push code changes in the Development account to the Production account. In the alpha phase, only two senior developers on the development team need access to the Production account. In the beta phase, more developers will need access to perform testing. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用每個帳戶中的 AWS 管理主控臺建立兩個原則文件。將策略指派給需要存取權限的開發人員。
A.en: Create two policy documents by using the AWS Management Console in each account. Assign the policy to developers who need access.

B.zh: 在開發帳戶中建立 IAM 角色。授予 IAM 角色對生產帳戶的存取權限。讓開發人員承擔這個角色。
B.en: Create an IAM role in the Development account. Grant the IAM role access to the Production account. Allow developers to assume the role.

C.zh: 在生產帳戶中建立 IAM 角色。定義指定開發帳戶的信任策略。讓開發人員承擔這個角色。
C.en: Create an IAM role in the Production account. Define a trust policy that specifies the Development account. Allow developers to assume the role.

D.zh: 在生產帳戶中建立 IAM 群組。將群組新增為指定生產帳戶的信任策略中的主體。將開發人員加入群組。
D.en: Create an IAM group in the Production account. Add the group as a principal in a trust policy that specifies the Production account. Add developers to the group.

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項不涉及實現跨帳戶訪問，僅在每個帳戶中建立策略文件並將其指派給開發者。這無法滿足開發者從開發帳戶存取生產帳戶的需求。
A.en: Incorrect. This option does not involve implementing cross-account access, only creating policy documents in each account and assigning them to developers. This cannot meet the needs of developers to access the Production account from the Development account.

B.zh: 錯誤。需要在目標帳戶（生產帳戶）中建立 IAM 角色，並定義信任策略以允許來源帳戶（開發帳戶）中的使用者或角色進行存取。此選項在開發帳戶中建立角色，邏輯不正確。
B.en: Incorrect. An IAM role needs to be created in the target account (Production account) and a trust policy defined to allow access by users or roles in the source account (Development account). This option creates a role in the Development account and the logic is incorrect.

C.zh: 正確。這是跨帳戶存取的標準實作。在目標帳戶（生產帳戶）中建立 IAM 角色，並定義信任策略以允許存取來源帳戶（開發帳戶）中的使用者或角色。開發者可以透過AssumeRole操作存取Production帳號。
C.en: Correct. This is the standard implementation of cross-account access. Create an IAM role in the target account (Production account) and define a trust policy to allow access to users or roles in the source account (Development account). Developers can access the Production account through the AssumeRole operation.

D.zh: 錯誤。IAM 群組不能用作信任策略中的主體。信任策略只能指定使用者、角色或帳號為主體。此選項的實作不符合AWS的權限管理邏輯。
D.en: Incorrect. IAM groups cannot be used as subjects in trust policies. Trust policies can only specify users, roles, or accounts as principals. The implementation of this option does not comply with AWS's permission management logic.

answer_text.zh: C. 在生產帳戶中建立 IAM 角色。定義指定開發帳戶的信任策略。讓開發人員承擔這個角色。
answer_text.en: C. Create an IAM role in the Production account. Define a trust policy that specifies the Development account. Allow developers to assume the role.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (72%)； D (22%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：這是跨帳戶存取的標準實作。在目標帳戶（生產帳戶）中建立 IAM 角色，並定義信任策略以允許存取來源帳戶（開發帳戶）中的使用者或角色。開發者可以透過AssumeRole操作存取Production帳號。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (72%); D (22%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This is the standard implementation of cross-account access. Create an IAM role in the target account (Production account) and define a trust policy to allow access to users or roles in the source account (Development account). Developers can access the Production account through the AssumeRole operation.
